channel.title: Surfaced — Discover What's Next
channel.description: Fresh discoveries, trending products, hidden gems, future tech, and daily tools — curated every day.

item.title: Amazfit Balance Smartwatch
item.description: The Amazfit Balance is a premium smartwatch focused on holistic health and wellness tracking, offering advanced features like AI-powered coaching, stress monitoring, and body composition analysis. It boasts a vibrant AMOLED display, long battery life, and a sleek, modern design suitable for both athletic pursuits and everyday wear. This watch is perfect for individuals seeking detailed insights into their physical and mental well-being, integrated into a stylish and feature-rich wearable.

item.title: Framework Laptop 13 (AMD Ryzen 7040 Series)
item.description: The Framework Laptop 13 is a highly customizable and repairable laptop that now features the latest AMD Ryzen 7040 series processors, offering exceptional performance and efficiency. Users can configure their laptop from the ground up, choosing their preferred CPU, RAM, storage, and even port modules, ensuring a device tailored to their exact needs. Its commitment to sustainability and longevity through easy upgrades and repairs makes it an ideal choice for environmentally conscious consumers and power users alike.

item.title: LG StanbyME Go Portable Entertainment Screen
item.description: The LG StanbyME Go is a revolutionary portable entertainment screen that combines a 27-inch Full HD IPS display with a built-in battery and speakers, all housed in a sleek suitcase design. It offers a unique tabletop viewing experience, ideal for spontaneous movie nights, presentations, or gaming sessions anywhere. With its integrated stand and wireless connectivity, it's designed for ultimate convenience and portability, making it perfect for dorm rooms, outdoor gatherings, or even small office spaces.

item.title: Sleep Headphones Wireless Headband
item.description: A soft Bluetooth headband with ultra-thin flat speakers built in — for sleeping with music, podcasts, or white noise without earbuds.

item.title: Smart WiFi Body Composition Scale
item.description: A Bluetooth/WiFi scale that measures weight, BMI, body fat %, muscle mass, and 10+ other metrics — syncs with Apple Health and Fitbit.

item.title: Shiatsu Electric Foot Massager with Heat
item.description: A foot-bath-style massager with kneading shiatsu nodes, rolling massage, and optional heat for full-foot and arch relief.

item.title: DJI Mic Mini Wireless Lavalier Microphone
item.description: An ultralight 2-transmitter wireless microphone system for creators — 48 hours of use, automatic noise cancelling, and plug-and-play for iPhone, Android, and cameras.

item.title: iRestore LED Light Therapy Face Mask (360 LEDs)
item.description: A 360-LED clinical-grade light therapy mask with red, blue, and near-infrared wavelengths — one of the highest LED densities at this price.

item.title: RENPHO Eyeris 3 Eye Massager with Heat & Cooling
item.description: The upgraded eye massager with both heat and cooling modes, voice control, and Bluetooth music — for premium eye and migraine relief.

item.title: RENPHO Active Massage Gun Mini
item.description: A compact 280g percussive therapy gun with five speed settings and four head attachments — quiet enough to use in an office.

item.title: Netro Whisperer Smart Plant Sensor (Solar)
item.description: A solar-powered smart garden sensor that monitors soil moisture, temperature, and sunlight — syncs with the Netro smart irrigation system.

item.title: RAINPOINT Smart WiFi Plant Moisture Sensor
item.description: A WiFi-connected soil probe that sends push notifications and emails when your plant is too dry or too wet — app controlled.

item.title: GYH 8-Color Wireless LED Light Therapy Mask
item.description: An FSA/HSA-eligible wireless LED face mask with 8 treatment colours including green for dark spots and near-infrared for deep tissue.

item.title: TMY 1080P Portable Mini Projector
item.description: A compact portable projector with full 1080p support, Bluetooth audio, and a 170-inch max screen size — for movies anywhere.

item.title: Ninja Blast Portable Blender
item.description: A cordless USB-C rechargeable personal blender that makes a protein shake or smoothie directly in its 18oz to-go vessel.

item.title: Shiatsu Neck & Back Massager Pillow
item.description: A U-shaped massager pillow with four deep-kneading shiatsu nodes and built-in heat — for the car, office chair, or couch.

item.title: Sunrise Alarm Clock Wake-Up Light
item.description: A bedside lamp that simulates a natural sunrise over 30 minutes, gradually brightening to wake you without a jarring alarm sound.

item.title: Heated Neck & Shoulder Massager Wrap
item.description: A heated massage pad that drapes over the neck and shoulders with shiatsu nodes that knead tension away hands-free.

item.title: Electric Spin Scrubber with Extension Arm
item.description: A cordless rotating brush with an adjustable extension arm for cleaning tile, grout, bathtubs, and toilets without kneeling.

item.title: Auxoliev 4-Color LED Light Therapy Face Mask
item.description: An FSA/HSA-eligible LED face mask with four light modes — red, blue, green, and yellow — for a comprehensive at-home facial treatment.

item.title: BlissLights Sky Lite Evolve Galaxy Projector
item.description: The upgraded Sky Lite with patented nebula cloud technology, WiFi app control, and voice-assistant integration.

item.title: RENPHO Eyeris 1 Eye Massager with Heat
item.description: A wearable eye massager with oscillating compression, built-in heat, and Bluetooth music — FSA and HSA eligible.

item.title: Resistance Bands 5-Pack (Loop Style)
item.description: Five graduated resistance loop bands — from light to extra-heavy — for home workouts, physical therapy, and warm-ups.

item.title: Cold Brew Coffee Maker Pitcher
item.description: A glass or BPA-free pitcher with a fine-mesh steeping filter for making smooth, low-acid cold brew concentrate at home.

item.title: Travel Packing Cubes 6-Pack
item.description: Six compression packing cubes in different sizes that organise a suitcase by outfit or category — and compress clothes to fit more in.

item.title: High-Density Grid Foam Roller
item.description: A textured foam roller with a multi-dimensional grid surface that targets muscle knots more precisely than smooth rollers.

item.title: Anti-Fatigue Standing Desk Mat
item.description: A thick ergonomic foam mat that cushions feet and encourages micro-movements during standing desk sessions.

item.title: NEWKEY LED Light Therapy Face Mask
item.description: A wearable LED face mask with red light (anti-ageing) and blue light (anti-acne) modes — professional phototherapy at home.

item.title: BlissLights Sky Lite 2.0 Galaxy Projector
item.description: An app-controlled RGB laser star and nebula cloud projector that syncs to music and transforms any room into a galaxy.

item.title: Tangram Smart Jump Rope Rookie
item.description: A Bluetooth jump rope that counts jumps, calories, and duration automatically — synced to an app via Bluetooth.

item.title: Portable UV-C Sanitizer Wand
item.description: A handheld UV-C light wand that kills 99.9% of bacteria and viruses on surfaces in 10 seconds — no chemicals required.

item.title: Acupressure Mat and Pillow Set
item.description: A foam mat covered in thousands of plastic acupressure points that stimulate circulation and relieve back pain when you lie on it.

item.title: Wireless Qi Fast Charging Pad
item.description: A slim 15W wireless charging pad for iPhone and Android — just set it down, no cables to plug in.

item.title: Silicone Stretch Lids Food Cover Set
item.description: Expandable silicone lids in multiple sizes that seal any bowl, pot, can, or container — the reusable plastic-wrap alternative.

item.title: Electric Lint Remover & Fabric Shaver
item.description: A rechargeable electric shaver that removes fabric pills, fuzz, and lint from sweaters, sofas, and clothes in seconds.

item.title: Galaxy Star Projector for Bedroom
item.description: A compact rotating projector that fills a room with stars, nebula clouds, and aurora effects — with app and voice control.

item.title: Digital Food Kitchen Scale
item.description: A precision kitchen scale accurate to 1 gram, with a pull-out display for easy reading in any bowl or container.

item.title: Collapsible Silicone Water Bottle
item.description: A food-grade silicone bottle that collapses to 1 inch flat when empty — perfect for travel, hiking, and gym bags.

item.title: Smart WiFi Mini Plug (2-Pack)
item.description: Compact smart plugs that turn any outlet into a voice-controlled or app-controlled socket — works with Alexa and Google Home.

item.title: COSRX Advanced Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence
item.description: A 96.3% snail secretion filtrate serum that repairs skin barrier damage, fades hyperpigmentation, and delivers intense hydration.

item.title: 3D Contoured Sleep Eye Mask
item.description: A moulded eye mask with two contoured cups that create complete darkness without touching the eyelids — comfortable for side and back sleepers.

item.title: Digital Handheld Luggage Scale
item.description: A hook-and-lift luggage scale that reads your bag's weight in under 3 seconds — saves you from airline overweight fees.

item.title: Rechargeable Clip-On Book Reading Light
item.description: A USB-rechargeable LED light that clips onto any book, Kindle, or notebook — three brightness levels and a flexible neck.

item.title: Transparent Sticky Notes 1000-Pack (6 Sizes)
item.description: 1000 waterproof clear sticky notes across six sizes — from tiny flags to full 3×3 annotation pads.

item.title: Longmann Invisible Posture Corrector
item.description: An ultra-thin posture brace made from breathable elastic that sits flat under any shirt — genuinely invisible in daily wear.

item.title: Google Plans to Invest up to $40B in Anthropic
item.description: This Bloomberg article reports on Google's significant planned investment in Anthropic, a leading AI safety and research company. The substantial funding indicates a major strategic move by Google to bolster its position in the rapidly evolving artificial intelligence landscape, likely focusing on advanced AI model development and competitive edge against rivals.

item.title: BAIMEI Jade Roller + Gua Sha Facial Tools
item.description: A classic jade stone roller and gua sha scraping tool set — the skincare ritual that has millions of daily practitioners.

item.title: New 10 GbE USB Adapters
item.description: This article, written by Jeff Geerling, details recent advancements in 10 Gigabit Ethernet (10 GbE) USB adapters. It highlights how new models are becoming more compact, efficient (cooler running), and importantly, more affordable. The piece provides a practical overview for users looking to upgrade their network connectivity for faster data transfers, particularly relevant for home lab enthusiasts, content creators, and small businesses.

item.title: Truweo Posture Corrector Back Brace
item.description: A figure-8 back brace that gently pulls the shoulders back, re-training posture while sitting, standing, or working.

item.title: How LLMs Work
item.description: This is an interactive visual guide that demystifies the inner workings of Large Language Models (LLMs), based on Andrej Karpathy's influential lecture. It breaks down complex concepts like tokenization, embeddings, attention mechanisms, and transformer architectures into digestible, visual explanations. The tool allows users to explore these concepts dynamically, making the learning process more engaging and intuitive.
